name: Arab Bank
description: One of the largest financial institutions in the Arab world, founded in 1930, with over 600 branches and offices spanning five continents. Publicly traded on the Amman Stock Exchange under ticker ARBK.

name: Housing Bank for Trade and Finance
description: Established in 1973, one of the leading banks in Jordan with the largest and most widely distributed branch network. Located in Al-Shumaysani, Amman.

name: Jordan Ahli Bank
description: Founded in 1956, a leading commercial bank in Jordan with operations in Lebanon, Palestine, and Cyprus.

name: Cairo Amman Bank
description: Established in 1960, headquartered in Wadi Saqra, Amman. Offers retail, corporate and investment banking services.

name: Bank of Jordan
description: Established in 1960, a major commercial bank in Jordan providing retail and corporate banking services.

name: Jordan Kuwait Bank
description: Established in 1977, a major commercial bank in Jordan. P.O. Box 9776 Amman 11191. Contact center: +962-6-5200999.

name: Arab Jordan Investment Bank
description: Founded in 1978, headquartered at 200 Zahran Street, Amman. An investment-focused commercial bank with 21 local branches.

name: Jordan Commercial Bank
description: Established in 1978, headquartered at King Abdallah II Street, 8th Circle, Building No. 384, Amman.

name: Jordan Islamic Bank
description: Established in 1978, an Islamic bank based in Shmeisani, Amman. Provides Sharia-compliant banking products and services.

name: INVESTBANK
description: Established in 1989, a commercial bank providing retail and investment banking services in Jordan.

name: Bank ABC Jordan
description: Established in 1989 in Jordan, a branch of Bank ABC (Arab Banking Corporation) providing commercial banking services.

name: Bank al Etihad
description: Established in 1991, a commercial bank in Jordan offering retail, corporate, and digital banking services.

name: Capital Bank of Jordan
description: Established in 1996, one of Jordan's premier financial institutions with total assets of JOD 8.2 billion and total equity of approximately JOD 724.6 million.

name: Islamic International Arab Bank
description: Established in 1997, an Islamic bank providing Sharia-compliant banking services. P.O. Box 925802 Amman 11190.

name: Safwa Islamic Bank
description: Established in 2009, a Jordanian Islamic bank providing Sharia-compliant financial products and services.

name: Egyptian Arab Land Bank
description: A foreign bank branch established in Jordan in 1951, providing banking services.

name: Rafidain Bank
description: An Iraqi state-owned bank with a branch in Jordan, established 1957.

name: Citibank Jordan
description: Citibank has been established in Jordan since 1974, becoming a key player in the local banking sector. A branch of the global Citigroup.

name: BLOM Bank Jordan
description: A branch of BLOM Bank Group, established in Jordan in 2004, providing retail and corporate banking services.

name: Al Rajhi Bank Jordan
description: Established in Jordan in 2011, a branch of the Saudi-based Al Rajhi Bank, providing Islamic banking services.

name: Central Bank of Jordan
description: The central bank and financial regulatory authority of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, responsible for monetary policy, licensing banks and financial institutions.

name: Gulf Insurance Group Jordan (GIG Jordan)
description: Established in 1996 under the name Arab Orient Insurance Company, joined the Gulf Insurance Group in 2009. One of Jordan's leading insurance providers with 28 years of experience.

name: Jordan Insurance Company
description: Founded in 1951, the oldest insurance company in Jordan. Located at Prince Mohammad Street, 3rd Circle, Jabal Amman. Listed on Amman Stock Exchange.

name: Middle East Insurance Company (MEICO)
description: Founded in 1962, a leading multi-line insurance company providing insurance products and services. Located on Al Kindi Street, Amman.

name: MetLife Jordan
description: A pioneer of life insurance in Jordan with over 65 years of presence. Provides life, accident and health insurance along with investment and savings products.

name: Al-Nisr Al-Arabi Insurance Company
description: Founded in 1976, one of the leading insurance providers in Jordan. Located at Shmeisani, Esam Ajlouni Street, Building No. 21, Amman. Provides life, medical, marine, fire, engineering, liability, and general accident insurance.

name: Delta Insurance
description: Established in 1973, a pioneering insurance company listed on the Amman Stock Exchange since October 2003. Located at 3rd Circle, 15 Al Hussein Bin Ali Street, Jabal Amman.

name: Jerusalem Insurance Company
description: An insurance company based in Amman, Jordan. Located at Building #288 King Abdullah II Street, Al Jandawil, Amman. Call center: +962-6-5692577.

name: Jordan French Insurance Company (JOFICO)
description: Established in 1976, located at Shmeisani, Abdul Hamid Sharaf Street, Building No. 124, Amman. A pioneering company in Jordan's insurance sector.

name: Euro Arab Insurance Group
description: Established in 1996 as Amman Insurance Co. Ltd, renamed to Euro Arab Insurance Group in 2002. Operates multiple offices across Jordan including Amman, Irbid, and Aqaba.

name: United Insurance Company
description: Incorporated in 1972, a leading composite insurance provider in Jordan offering both Life and General Insurance solutions. Located at Zahran Street, Building No. 188, Amman.

name: National Insurance Company
description: Established in 1965, providing distinguished insurance services to the public and private sectors in Jordan.

name: Solidarity First Insurance Company
description: Established in 2007, an Islamic Takaful insurance company providing motor, property, general accidents, medical, and aviation insurance products.

name: Arab Jordanian Insurance Group (AJIG)
description: Located at Al Sharif Nasser Bin Jameel Street, Amman. P.O. Box 840657, Amman 11184. Listed on Amman Stock Exchange.

name: Islamic Insurance Company
description: The first Takaful Insurance Company in Jordan, established in 1996 with a capital of JD 2 million now reaching JD 15 million. Manages funds in accordance with Islamic Sharia principles.

name: AL-Manara Insurance
description: An insurance company operating in Jordan providing general and life insurance services.

name: Arabia Insurance Company Jordan (AICJ)
description: A branch of Arabia Insurance Company operating in Jordan, providing composite insurance products and services.

name: Zain Jordan
description: One of Jordan's three major mobile network operators. Part of the Zain Group (Kuwait-based). Headquartered at 8th Circle, King Abdullah II Street, P.O. Box 940821, Amman 11194. Offers 4G and 5G mobile, data, and digital services.

name: Orange Jordan
description: One of Jordan's three major mobile network operators. Subsidiary of Orange S.A. (France). Headquartered at Boulevard Al-Abdali, Black Iris St., Amman 11118. Offers fixed-line, mobile, internet, and fiber services.

name: Umniah
description: One of Jordan's three major mobile network operators. Subsidiary of Batelco Group (Bahrain). Headquartered at Queen Nour St., Al-Shmeisani, P.O. Box 942481, Amman 11194. Offers 4G and 5G mobile and data services.

name: Jordan Telecom Group
description: The parent entity of Orange Jordan, originally the Jordan Telecommunications Corporation (JTC). Holds the foundational telecom license in Jordan for fixed-line, broadband, and mobile services.

name: MadfooatCom (eFAWATEERcom)
description: Established in 2011, Jordan's leading fintech company operating the national electronic bill presentment and payment system eFAWATEERcom. Headquartered at King Hussein Business Park, Amman. Partnered with the Central Bank of Jordan.

name: Dinarak
description: An app-based mobile wallet licensed by the Central Bank of Jordan under JoMoPay, launched in late 2015. Allows users to withdraw cash, transfer money, pay bills, and pay at merchants. Over 600 active agents and 350,000 customers.

name: Liwwa
description: Founded in 2015, the first peer-to-peer lending platform in Jordan. Provides fast, affordable credit to small and medium businesses in craft and retail sectors.

name: Capifly
description: Developed the first online lending platform for startups in the MENA region, offering fast, short-term Sharia-compliant and non-dilutive financing.

name: Solfeh
description: A fintech micro-lending platform providing same-day emergency cash advancements to salaried employees in Jordan.

name: InvoiceQ
description: A comprehensive platform designed to fully digitize the invoicing process and make payment collection smoother and more efficient for businesses in Jordan.

name: Ahli Fintech
description: A wholly owned subsidiary of Jordan Ahli Bank, fully licensed to create, co-create, license, sell and invest in fintech solutions. Acts as a launchpad and accelerator for fintech startups.

name: Alawneh Exchange
description: Jordan's leading money transfer and currency exchange house since 1966. Operates 51 branches across Jordan with over 1000 employees. SWIFT network member offering Western Union services.

name: Abu Sheikha Exchange
description: Established 1994, one of the leading exchange houses in Jordan with a network of 21 branches. Main agent for Western Union in Jordan. Located at Wasfi Al Tal St., Gardens area, Amman.

name: Musharbash Exchange
description: One of the first pioneers in the Jordanian money exchange industry, established in 1940 and the first company licensed by the Central Bank of Jordan. Located at Wasfi Al Tal Gardens, Amman.

name: Jordan UAE Exchange
description: A leading money transfer and foreign exchange services provider in Jordan. Located at 225 Queen Rania Street, Tla Al Ali, Amman. Multiple branches across Amman.

name: Future Exchange Company
description: A licensed money exchange company based in Rabieh, Amman, Jordan.

name: Jordan Valley Exchange
description: A licensed money exchange company located on Abd Ar-Rahim Al-Hajj Muhammad St., Downtown Amman.

name: Al-Samhouri Exchange

name: Al-Furat Exchange
description: A licensed money exchange company located on Wasfi Al-Tal Street, Gardens area, Amman.

name: Al-Manar Exchange

name: Tamweelcom (Jordan Micro Credit Company)
name_ar: تمويلكم - الشركة الأردنية لتمويل المشاريع الصغيرة
description: Established in 1999, owned by King Hussein Foundation. Portfolio of over JD 60 million serving 95,800+ active clients through 39 branches. Located at King Abdullah II Intersection, Kheir Al-Dein Al-Maiane St., Amman.

name: National Microfinance Company (Alwatani)
description: A prominent microfinance institution in Jordan dedicated to delivering customized financial solutions to underserved communities. Located at Building 20, Yajooz Street, Al-Jubaha, Amman.

name: Microfund for Women
description: Jordan's first and largest Non-for-Profit Private Shareholding Company dedicated to empowering women entrepreneurs. Founded in 1994, licensed by Central Bank of Jordan. Located at Wadi Saqra, Arrar Street, Amman.

name: VITAS Jordan
description: A microfinance company operating in Jordan since 1998 (originally as MEMCC - Middle East Micro Credit Company). Provides financial solutions to individuals and small businesses across all governorates.

name: Ahli Microfinance Company (AMC)
description: Established in July 1999 as the first private sector microfinance company in Jordan. Wholly owned subsidiary of Jordan Ahli Bank. Has provided over JD 192 million in loans to 225,000+ customers through 26 branches.

name: Amman Stock Exchange (ASE)
description: The official stock exchange of Jordan, providing an organized, fair, transparent, and efficient market for trading securities. Hosts 68 licensed brokerage firms.

name: Jordan Securities Commission (JSC)
description: The regulatory body responsible for licensing, regulating, and supervising non-bank financial services sector in Jordan including brokerage firms, investment managers, and financial consultants.

name: Awraq Investments
description: Incorporated in 1992, one of the premier investment companies in Jordan and a subsidiary of Cairo Amman Bank. Provides a wide spectrum of investment and brokerage services.

name: Ahli Brokerage Company

name: BLOM Securities Jordan

name: United Financial Investments (UFICO)
